brightsmith_agentAttribution.reasoning: Bronze zone ingest of O*NET Education, Training, and Experience data (Related Work Experience and related scales). Extracts 'Education, Training, and Experience.txt' from the shared O*NET 30.2 ZIP archive already cached by sibling subclasses. Parses tab-delimited rows at grain (onet_soc_code, element_id, scale_id, category). All four scales (RL, RW, PT, OJ) ingested at Bronze; Silver will filter to RW scale only. Rows with null grain fields are skipped (1,127 such rows observed). Added as the 6th concrete subclass in src/raw/onet_ingestor.py (not a new file).

documentation.description: Ingest O*NET Education, Training, and Experience data into raw.onet_experience. Downloads the shared O*NET 30.2 ZIP archive via bulk_zip_download, extracts 'Education, Training, and Experience.txt', and parses tab-delimited rows at grain (onet_soc_code, element_id, scale_id, category). Coerces SOC codes via _coerce_onet_soc, numeric fields via _coerce_int/_coerce_double, and metadata flags via _coerce_string. Preserves recommend_suppress for downstream DQ filtering. Appends to Iceberg table with dedup on grain. All four scales (RL, RW, PT, OJ) retained; Silver filters to RW (element_id=3.A.1) only.

dataSource.format: ZIP archive containing tab-delimited text files

assertions.description: Rows written to raw.onet_experience Iceberg table. Within expected 30,000-45,000 P0 range.
Rows skipped due to null grain fields (onet_soc_code, element_id, scale_id, or category). Logged but not written.
Dedup grain enforced at ingest time — no duplicate rows at (onet_soc_code, element_id, scale_id, category).

onet_soc_code.transformationDescription: Direct string copy via _coerce_onet_soc(). Preserves O*NET-SOC XX-XXXX.XX format. Stripped of whitespace. Null if empty.

element_id.transformationDescription: Direct string copy via _coerce_string(). Content Model element ID (e.g., '3.A.1' for Related Work Experience, '3.A.2' for On-the-Job Training). Null if empty.

element_name.transformationDescription: Direct string copy via _coerce_string(). Element name (e.g., 'Related Work Experience'). Null if empty.

scale_id.transformationDescription: Direct string copy via _coerce_string(). Values are 'RL' (Required Level of Education), 'RW' (Related Work Experience), 'PT' (Prior Training), 'OJ' (On-the-Job Training). All four scales ingested at Bronze; Silver filters to RW only.

category.transformationDescription: Parsed from TSV string, coerced to integer via _coerce_int() (int(float(value))). Category ordinal within scale (1-11 for RW scale, 1-12 for RL, varies by scale). Part of grain — rows with null category are skipped.

data_value.transformationDescription: Parsed from TSV string, coerced to double via _coerce_double() (float(value)). Percent frequency for this category (0.0-100.0). Null if empty or 'n/a'.

n.transformationDescription: Parsed from TSV string, coerced to integer via _coerce_int(). Sample size. Null if empty or 'n/a'.

standard_error.transformationDescription: Parsed from TSV string, coerced to double via _coerce_double(). Null if empty or 'n/a'.

lower_ci_bound.transformationDescription: Parsed from TSV string, coerced to double via _coerce_double(). Null if empty or 'n/a'.

upper_ci_bound.transformationDescription: Parsed from TSV string, coerced to double via _coerce_double(). Null if empty or 'n/a'.

recommend_suppress.transformationDescription: Direct string copy via _coerce_string(). O*NET data quality flag. Values are 'Y' or 'N'. Preserved as-is for Silver zone filtering (suppress_flag aggregation).

date.transformationDescription: Direct string copy via _coerce_string(). Data collection date. Null if empty.

domain_source.transformationDescription: Direct string copy via _coerce_string(). Values are 'Incumbent' or 'Occupational Expert'. Null if empty.

ingested_at.transformationDescription: Framework-generated UTC timestamp at time of ingest. Added by BaseIngestor.ingest(), not from source data.

source_url.transformationDescription: Framework-generated field recording the ZIP download URL used for this ingest run.

source_method.transformationDescription: Framework-generated field recording the fetch method name ('bulk_zip_download').

load_date.transformationDescription: Framework-generated date (UTC) of the ingest run. Derived from ingested_at.
